name: Mardarin Orange Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can frozen orange juice, unsweetened (6 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cracker crumbs, butter and sugar. Press mixture firmly into a 9 x 13-inch baking dish, reserving some crumbs for garnish.
2. Blend thawed orange juice with milk. Fold in Cool Whip and mandarin oranges; do not beat.
3. Pour the blended mixture over the crust.
4. Top with reserved cracker crumbs.
5. Refrigerate or freeze until serving.
